commands.summary: Governance validation passed on the 2.3.0 tree with the re-pinned moto-one-hyper vendored adopter (upstream_revision f371c54).
19/19 conformance cases passed, including SPEC-4-release-label accept and core-mismatch reject.
The adopter fleet verified, including the re-vendored moto-one-hyper at RepoPact 2.3.0.
All 112 unit tests passed with the two declared formal-model tests skipped.

commands.command: python -m build && python -m twine check dist/repopact-2.3.0*
